name: B'T X
overview: After years of absence, Teppei’s joyous reunion with his brother  is cut short when the two brothers are attacked.  When his brother is kidnapped, Teppei gives chase only to find himself cornered in a junkyard when a  miracle appears. His spilled blood awakens the legendary B’t X.
